description: Scite is an AI-powered research platform for discovering and evaluating scientific literature, including citation context and Smart Citations that show whether later work supports or contradicts a claim. It also offers AI-assisted literature search and assistant features for researchers and organizations.
summary: Scite exposes a general HTTP API at api.scite.ai, a separate Assistant API, and a streamable-HTTP MCP server at https://api.scite.ai/mcp authenticated via Scite-issued bearer tokens or MCP OAuth.
